title: Serendipity (SoL)
synopsis: The romance between a New Yorker and a British woman is short-lived as they let fate determine if they are meant to be together. Years later, they hope that destiny reunites them.

synopsis_lang.en: The romance between a New Yorker and a British woman is short-lived as they let fate determine if they are meant to be together. Years later, they hope that destiny reunites them.
synopsis_lang.zh_hk: 莊尼頓在商店邂逅莎拉，為之傾心。但雙方各有愛侶，莎拉提議將聯絡方法分別寫在紙幣和舊書上，認為有緣必能相見。十年後，莊尼頓一直尋找該本舊書卻徒勞無功，而在另一方的莎拉卻思念起當年邂逅的莊尼頓。一對有情男女最終能否重逢？

subtitle: Chinese
